messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I am here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?

Thank you, Nagraj! I'm glad to assist you with your concern. Could you tell me which category your issue falls under?

Is it Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else? Please let me know, and I'll do my best to help you resolve it efficiently.

Sorry to hear that, Nagraj! Network issues can be frustrating. Can you please describe what exactly is happening with your network issue? Is it related to internet connectivity, data speed, or something else? The more details you can provide, the better I'll be able to assist you.
